Coin.doc: represents a coin on the Chia blockchain, identified by its parent coin info, puzzle hash, and amount.

coin_id.doc: computes the unique coin ID by hashing the parent coin info, puzzle hash, and amount.

CoinSpend.doc: represents a spent coin, including the puzzle reveal and solution.

SpendBundle.doc: represents a bundle of coin spends with an aggregated BLS signature.

to_bytes.doc: serializes the spend bundle to bytes.

from_bytes.doc: deserializes a spend bundle from bytes.

hash.doc: computes the hash of the spend bundle.

CoinState.doc: represents the on-chain state of a coin, including its creation and spend heights.

Spend.doc: represents a puzzle and solution pair for spending a coin.
